## ActivityMetrics type

Quantitative activity metrics accumulated between page pings. Attached as a context entity when activityMetrics is enabled.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
type ActivityMetrics = {
    mouseDistance: number;
    scrollDistance: number;
    keyPresses: number;
    clicks: number;
    touches: number;
};
```
